topMoments.subject: Fix Jest configuration and test failures
topMoments.tension: If the schedule answer feels wrong once, people start doubting the whole product.
topMoments.lesson: Bug fixes become content when you explain the wrong assumption, not just the patch.
topMoments.evidence: the hesitation point inside the schedule answer resolves more cleanly now
topMoments.proof: the hesitation point inside the schedule answer resolves more cleanly now
